calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-22-2004 Continued To Jan-26-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-26-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patty Lee Hubble.
Michael Rossoff, Esq., for Plaintiff Neveo Mosser.
No appearance by the Defendant Patricia Ann Robinson.
09:20 am. - Plaintiff's witness Yelena Kazantseva was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Lease agreement ---------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #2 - Three days Notice -------------- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises at: 917 Folsom St., #309, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $1,120.00
No Attorney's Fees.
Plaintiff waived costs.
For the total of $1,120.00
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibit.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2004 Off Calendar
